THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT POOLE, MARK LOREN THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: RESTITUTION OF PREMISES AT 1550 EDDY ST, #427, STAYED UNTIL JUN-23-1993, IF THE DEF.
